text: ⚡️ 🇻🇪 🇨🇴 Acting Venezuelan President Rodriguez announcd that Venezuela and Colombia are working on eletrical grid and gas insfrastructure interconnection. "On the other hand, we have also talked about the electrical interconnection for the West of Venezuela, which is such a priority at this moment, as the West of the country knows, but also the Venezuelan people, who suffer from what has been the process of disinvestment in the national electrical system, as a result of sanctions that have directly affected the supply of maintenance supplies to our national electrical system. So, the electrical interconnection is already a step forward, and also the gasification interconnection, where we can not only bring gas to Colombia, but we can also export gas to other countries. So, the electrical interconnection and the gasification interconnection are also part of the approach that we have taken at this moment." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇻🇪 🇨🇴 委内瑞拉代理总统罗德里格斯宣布，委内瑞拉和哥伦比亚正在致力于电网和天然气基础设施的互联互通。“另一方面，我们也谈到了委内瑞拉西部的电力互联，这在目前是一个优先事项，正如该国西部所知，委内瑞拉人民也深知这一点，他们遭受了国家电力系统投资不足的过程，这是制裁直接影响了我们国家电力系统维护物资供应的结果。因此，电力互联已经向前迈进了一步，还有气化互联，我们不仅可以将天然气输送到哥伦比亚，还可以将天然气出口到其他国家。因此，电力互联和气化互联也是我们目前采取的方法的一部分。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Politico: White House insiders increasingly see Secretary of State Marco Rubio as a rising figure and a potential Republican contender for the 2028 presidential race. Rubio’s profile has grown significantly inside the Trump administration, with allies pointing to his expanding influence on foreign policy and national security matters. Officials cited his prominent role in recent diplomatic crises and his close working relationship with President Donald Trump as factors boosting his standing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Politico：白宫内部人士日益将国务卿马尔科·卢比奥视为一颗冉冉升起的新星，以及2028年总统竞选的潜在共和党竞争者。卢比奥在特朗普政府内部的知名度显著提升，盟友们指出他在外交政策和国家安全事务上的影响力正在扩大。官员们提到，他在近期外交危机中的突出作用以及与唐纳德·特朗普总统密切的工作关系，是提升他地位的因素。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇪🇺🇺🇸🇨🇳Bloomberg: The EU is planning on agreeing on strategic partnership roadmap with the U.S. a critical minerals deal in an effort to restrain Chinese influence. The process is expected to come together within three months and aims on detailing a plan…" ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇺🇸 EU Trade Commissioner Šefčovič and U.S. Secretary of State Rubio signed a strategic critical minerals partnership with the U.S. this Friday. @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Iranian MFA Spokesman Esmaeil Baqaei: We arrive in Islamabad, Pakistan, for an official visit. FM Araghchi will be meeting with Pakistani high-level officials in concert with their ongoing mediation & good offices for ending American imposed war of aggression and the restitution of peace in our region. No meeting is planned to take place between Iran and the U.S. Iran's observations would be conveyed to Pakistan. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：我们抵达巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡进行正式访问。阿拉格齐外长将与巴基斯坦高级官员会晤，配合他们正在进行的斡旋与调停工作，以结束美国强加的侵略战争并恢复我们地区的和平。目前没有计划举行伊朗与美国之间的会晤。伊朗的意见将转达给巴基斯坦。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump attacks right-wing podcaster and conspiracy theorist Candace Owens in a post on TruthSocial, calling her an “extremely Low IQ individual,” while including a fake cover of Time Magazine which labels her “Vile Person of the Year.” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047795436270879116/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普在TruthSocial上发帖抨击右翼播客和阴谋论者坎迪斯·欧文斯，称她为“智商极低的人”，并附上了一张伪造的《时代》杂志封面，上面称她为“年度卑鄙人物”。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047795436270879116/photo/1 推文

text: Kash Patel, now head of the FBI, disclosed that he was arrested twice in his youth for alcohol-related incidents—once for underage public intoxication (2001) and once for public urination after leaving a bar (2005). He said both incidents were mistakes and not reflective of his usual behavior. Source: The Intercept
text_zh: 现任联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）披露，他年轻时曾因酒精相关事件被捕两次——一次是2001年因未成年公共场合醉酒，另一次是2005年离开酒吧后在公共场合随地小便。他表示这两次事件都是错误，并不能反映他平时的行为。来源：The Intercept

text: Some allies of Trump increasingly see Marco Rubio as a serious 2028 presidential contender. Once viewed as too establishment after his failed 2016 run, Rubio has gained support through his loyalty to Trump, active role in foreign policy, and stronger alignment with MAGA priorities. While JD Vance remains the frontrunner, Rubio’s polling numbers have risen and he’s now seen inside the White House as a viable alternative. Source: POLITICO
text_zh: 特朗普的一些盟友越来越将马可·鲁比奥（Marco Rubio）视为2028年总统大选的有力竞争者。鲁比奥在2016年竞选失败后曾被认为过于建制派，但通过对特朗普的忠诚、在外交政策中的积极作用以及与“让美国再次伟大”（MAGA）优先事项的更紧密结合，他赢得了支持。虽然万斯（JD Vance）仍是领跑者，但鲁比奥的民调数字有所上升，目前在白宫内部被视为一个可行的替代人选。来源：POLITICO

text: Trump: The first time Lafayette Park Fountains, opposite the White House, have worked in decades. My Great Honor to have funded this project (and many others!), and helped.
text_zh: 特朗普：白宫对面的拉斐特公园喷泉几十年来首次恢复工作。我很荣幸能资助这个项目（以及其他许多项目！），并提供了帮助。

text: Trump: Hakeem “High Tax” Jeffries is a Low IQ individual who is not smart enough to be “running” the Democrat Party, and certainly not smart enough to be involved in running the United States of America. It’s people like this who almost destroyed our Nation with their High Tax, Open Border Policies. In the future, Hakeem, a fine American name, will forever be known as HIGH TAX!
text_zh: 特朗普：哈基姆·“高税收”·杰弗里斯（Hakeem “High Tax” Jeffries）是一个低智商的人，他不够聪明，无法“管理”民主党，当然也不够聪明去参与管理美利坚合众国。正是这样的人，用他们的高税收和开放边境政策差点摧毁了我们的国家。未来，哈基姆这个美好的美国名字，将永远被称为“高税收”！

text: Trump: Candace Owens’ stock, which was never very high, has fallen a long way. Her attack on the First Lady of France is despicable. I believe, in this case, without verification, she is an extremely Low IQ individual!
text_zh: 特朗普：坎迪斯·欧文斯（Candace Owens）的声望本来就不高，现在更是跌入谷底。她对法国第一夫人的攻击是卑鄙的。我相信，在这种情况下，无需核实，她就是一个极低智商的人！

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : People choosing between gas and groceries don’t have “all the time in the world.” Hegseth: “We have all the time in the world, and we're not anxious for a deal” https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2047659213049012429/video/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump calls Candace Owens "an extremely Low IQ individual!" Posting a fake magazine cover with Candace as Time's "Vile Person of the Year." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2047794933503771070/photo/1 tweet

text: OSINTdefender Traders on Polymarket remain skeptical about further changes in Iranian leadership by the end of the year, despite reports that Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei continues to suffer from serious injuries he sustained during initial strikes during the Iran War and repeated threats by both Israel and the United States. Chances that Mojtaba is removed from power by December 31, 2026, currently sit at roughly 40%. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 尽管有报道称伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）在伊朗战争初期的袭击中受了重伤，且以色列和美国多次发出威胁，但Polymarket的交易员们对伊朗领导层在年底前发生进一步变动仍持怀疑态度。莫杰塔巴在2026年12月31日前被免职的可能性目前约为40%。推文

text: WarMonitor A law meant for national defense is now being stretched to rescue a budget airline. Scoop: Trump administration is exploring using the Defense Production Act as part of a strategy to save the beleaguered Spirit Airlines, sources told @olivialarinaldi and me. @CBSNews https://www.cbsnews.com/news/white-house-mulls-using-defense-production-act-in-spirit-airlines-takeover/ - Jennifer Jacobs tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一项旨在国防的法律现在正被延伸用于拯救一家廉价航空公司。独家报道：消息人士告诉 @olivialarinaldi 和我，特朗普政府正在探索利用《国防生产法》作为拯救陷入困境的精神航空（Spirit Airlines）战略的一部分。@CBSNews https://www.cbsnews.com/news/white-house-mulls-using-defense-production-act-in-spirit-airlines-takeover/ - 詹妮弗·雅各布斯（Jennifer Jacobs）推文

text: OSINTtechnical Iran’s Foreign Ministry spokesman: No meeting is planned to take place between Iran and the U.S. Any communication will be relayed by Pakistan. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗外交部发言人：伊朗和美国之间没有计划举行任何会议。任何沟通都将通过巴基斯坦转达。推文

text: OSINTdefender A U.S. Air Force KC-46A Pegasus, likely supporting fighter or strike aircraft, is currently operating over the Persian Gulf off the coast of the United Arab Emirates, following today’s statement by Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth that American forces have been authorized to “shoot and kill” any Iranian fast-attack boats laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 一架美国空军KC-46A飞马加油机（可能正在支援战斗机或攻击机）目前正在阿拉伯联合酋长国海岸外的波斯湾上空作业。此前，国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）今天发表声明称，美军已获授权“开枪击毙”任何在霍尔木兹海峡布雷的伊朗快速攻击艇。推文

text: WarMonitor The Trump admin in a nutshell... https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047789823159574627/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普政府简而言之…… https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047789823159574627/video/1 推文

text: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei: No meeting is planned to take place between Iran and the U.S.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：目前没有计划举行伊朗与美国之间的会晤。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump on right-wing commentator Candace Owens: Candace Owens' stock, which was never very high, has fallen a long way. Her attack on the First Lady of France is despicable. I believe, in this case, without verification, she is an extremely Low IQ individual! @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普谈及右翼评论员坎迪斯·欧文斯：坎迪斯·欧文斯的声望本来就不高，现在更是跌入谷底。她对法国第一夫人的攻击是卑劣的。我相信，在这种情况下，未经核实，她是一个智商极低的人！@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰 IRNA: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad to discuss regional developments. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Baqaei says that no meetings between Iranian and U.S. officials are planned during Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi’s visit to Pakistan. Instead Iran plans to convey their observations to Pakistani mediators. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰 伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社：伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希抵达伊斯兰堡，讨论地区局势发展。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人巴盖伊表示，在伊朗外交部长阿拉格希访问巴基斯坦期间，没有计划举行伊朗与美国官员之间的会晤。相反，伊朗计划向巴基斯坦调解人传达他们的观察意见。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷Reuters: U.S. President Trump says that Iran is planning to make an offer aimed at satisfying U.S. demands. “They’re making an offer and we’ll have to see.” @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reuters: U.S. President Trump declined to answer what would be required for him to lift the blockade on the Strait of Hormuz. "I'd ​have to be able to answer ​that question later. I have to see what they're offering." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷路透社：美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗正计划提出一项旨在满足美国要求的提议。“他们正在提出提议，我们拭目以待。” @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 路透社：美国总统特朗普拒绝回答他解除霍尔木兹海峡封锁的条件。“我以后才能回答这个问题。我得看看他们提供什么。” @wfwitness

text: OSINTtechnical Footage of a Hezbollah fiber-optic FPV drone chasing down and striking an Israeli HMMWV in the southern Lebanese town of Qantara. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047786575833047298/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 真主党光纤 FPV 无人机在黎巴嫩南部坎塔拉镇追击并击中一辆以色列悍马车的视频。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047786575833047298/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Earlier: Air Force One has departed Joint Base Andrews, with U.S. President Donald Trump heading to his Mar-a-Lago estate in Florida, where he is expected to spend the night and most of Saturday. @FaytuksNetwork https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047785337456349220/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 早些时候：空军一号已离开安德鲁斯联合基地，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普正前往佛罗里达州的海湖庄园，预计将在那里过夜并度过周六的大部分时间。 @FaytuksNetwork https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047785337456349220/video/1 推文

text_zh: WarMonitor 有些人是自己最大的敌人。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047782517273510290/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Iranian media says no decision has been taken on whether the country will engage in another round of talks with the United States. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2047782229657706964/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 伊朗媒体称，尚未决定该国是否会与美国进行新一轮会谈。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2047782229657706964/photo/1 推文
